Class DialogPane.DialogButtonBar

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
javafx.scene.control.Control
javafx.scene.control.ButtonBar
com.dlsc.gemsfx.DialogPane.DialogButtonBar
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget, javafx.scene.control.Skinnable
Enclosing class:
DialogPane
public static class DialogPane.DialogButtonBar extends javafx.scene.control.ButtonBar
The default footer / button bar implementation for dialogs managed by the DialogPane.
See Also:
  • DialogPane.setHeaderFactory(Callback)
